productDisplayName: Puma Women Lucie Purple Flip Flops
description: This absolutely stylish pair of Lucie flip flops from puma makes it a fantastic casual wear option. The cushioned footbed ensures maximum comfort for the feet while the minimalist design of the cat adds a classy look. The brand badge coupled with a velvety inner along the synthetic straps is a perfect combination of comfort and style. The outsole ensures great grip on damp surfaces, making it great beachwear and pool side slipper. Upper Rubber upper offer dry comfort to the feet Rubber straps with padded inner Toe separator to hold the forefoot in place, and to add comfort and style Soft, cushioned footbed for step-in comfort Cat logo on the footbed Outsole PU outsole with waffle pattern grooves all over for grip and traction Flip flop care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
